landing.heroDesc: Niva combines Sentinel-2 data, machine learning and artificial intelligence to give you a complete picture of your crop health.
landing.featuresSectionTitle: All agronomist tools — in one place
landing.feat1Desc: NDVI, EVI, NDMI from Sentinel-2 every 5 days. Monitor crop health from orbit.
landing.feat2Desc: Machine learning predicts yield considering weather, soil type, and crop status.
landing.feat3Desc: Hyperlocal forecast directly for your field. Temperature, precipitation, humidity.
landing.feat4Desc: Artificial intelligence analyses field health and provides agronomist recommendations.
landing.feat5Desc: Draw your fields directly on the map. Area calculated automatically.
landing.feat6Desc: Total area, crop distribution, yield comparison across seasons.
landing.ctaDesc: Create a free account and add your first field in a minute.
landing.showcaseTitle: From a drawn field to a decision — in minutes
landing.show1Title: Draw your fields on the map
landing.show1Desc: Sketch any field boundary or drop a pin at your location. Niva computes the exact area instantly — no paperwork, no GPS survey.
landing.show1B3: Search by address or use your location
landing.show2Desc: Sentinel-2 satellites refresh every 5 days. Track NDVI, EVI, NDMI and SAVI over time and spot stress before it spreads.
landing.show3Title: Get AI insight and yield forecasts
landing.show3Desc: Machine learning predicts your yield, and AI writes a plain-language health report with agronomist-style recommendations.
landing.show3B1: ML yield forecast in t/ha with confidence
landing.advTitle: Built for real farms, not lab demos
landing.adv1Desc: Real Sentinel-2 imagery at 10 m resolution — the same data professional agronomists rely on.
landing.adv2Desc: No hardware, no installs. Draw a field and get insights in minutes from any browser.
landing.adv3Desc: Demoable without any API keys — synthetic data keeps the full flow running anywhere.
landing.adv4Desc: Seven languages, metric units, and a clean interface that stays out of your way.
landing.howTitle: Three steps to your first insight
landing.step1Desc: Draw the boundary on the map or drop a pin. Area is calculated automatically.
landing.step2Desc: Niva fetches Sentinel-2 indices and local weather for that exact plot.
landing.step3Desc: Read your NDVI trend, yield forecast and AI health report — then decide.
landing.q1: Do I need any API keys to try Niva?
landing.a1: No. Niva ships with synthetic satellite and weather data, so the full flow works out of the box. Add your own Sentinel Hub and OpenWeatherMap keys anytime for live data.
landing.q2: Which satellites and data sources do you use?
landing.a2: Sentinel-2 imagery (10 m, ~5-day revisit) for vegetation indices, OpenWeatherMap for weather, and Groq AI for field-health reports.
landing.a3: Getting started is free — create an account and add your first field in a minute. No credit card required.
landing.a4: Seven: Ukrainian, English, German, French, Spanish, Italian and Polish. Switch anytime from the top bar.
landing.q5: How accurate are the yield forecasts?
landing.a5: Forecasts use a machine-learning model trained on crop, soil and weather features, and each prediction comes with a confidence level. Treat them as guidance alongside field scouting.

meta.title: Niva — Satellite intelligence for your fields | NDVI, weather, AI yield forecast
meta.description: Niva is a precision-agriculture platform: satellite indices (NDVI/EVI), weather, ML yield forecasts and AI field-health reports powered by Sentinel-2.

onboarding.title: Welcome to Niva
onboarding.subtitle: Add your first field to unlock satellite analytics, weather and AI insights.
onboarding.step1: Draw your field on the map
onboarding.step2: Niva pulls Sentinel-2 imagery and local weather
onboarding.step3: Get NDVI trends, yield forecast and an AI health report
